headline: Sarawak Hydropower Export Plan Valued at RM15 Billion
context: Sarawak Energy proposed RM15 billion submarine cable project to export 3,000MW of hydropower to Peninsula and Singapore by 2030.

cards.big: Sarawak plans RM15 billion submarine cable to export 3,000MW
cards.sub: Hydropower surplus from Bakun and Baleh dams could supply Peninsula and Singapore

cards.big: Current submarine cable carries only 600MW to Peninsula at capacity
cards.sub: New 670km cable would triple export capacity and generate RM4 billion revenue

cards.big: Singapore expressed interest in purchasing 1,000MW of Sarawak green energy
cards.sub: Deal would make Sarawak Southeast Asia largest cross-border clean power exporter

cards.big: Environmental groups warn Baleh Dam displaced 3,000 Kayan and Kenyah people
cards.sub: Export profits flow to Sarawak Energy while displaced communities receive nothing

cards.big: Hydropower exports test whether clean energy development comes with fair distribution
RM15 billion hydropower exports could make Sarawak a regional energy hub within 8 years.
